TEXT: A feathered serpent seeking history and truth. NL To uncover the ancient secrets buried deep within the Spire, she gracefully steps into this endless cage. NL She once attempted to go against the currents, but has now made up her mind to go with the tide.
The echoes of history converge at this moment. NL Even this pulsating, grotesque heart is but a torn page in the long annals of time. NL All secrets shall eventually be revealed to you.

Walking through the dim streets, you stumble upon several hooded figures performing some dark ritual. As you approach, they turn to you in unison, the atmosphere eerie. NL The tallest of them bares their fangs and extends a pale hand towards you: NL ~"Join us,~ ~feathered serpent who seeks secrets...~ ~Cast aside those heavy piles of old paper,~ ~and feel the sweet warmth of blood."~
